title: Element Cattos For MC
description: A mod that tries to add as much Element Cattos sprites paintings as there is approved EC skins on namemc
body:
![Mod (Oberorka's purriodic table Label/Icon!) banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fa25d4ad14e0e7283c2f5e97fc9d3a93d61c06c.png)

Before we start:

***The game was made by Lily "Oberorka" Irie! I'm NOT the real creator of Element Cattos and this is a fan-made project!***

**Hi! If you like Element Cattos I recommend checking the real EC wiki over [here](https://elementcattos.miraheze.org/wiki/Main_Page):**

**And if you reaaaaaly want to, you can look at my userpage on the EC wiki [here](https://elementcattos.miraheze.org/wiki/User:Marcelros) bc [well, I don't know](https://elementcattos.miraheze.org/wiki/Lead-213).**



**Short Description:**

This little mod is a preview of my approved **Element Cattos** skins on namemc (they will be shown as Paintings in game), if you want you can check the list of them over [here](https://namemc.com/minecraft-skins/tag/element-cattos): 







**Loooong Description:**

![Looooooooooooooooooooooooooooong Sulfur catto](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31f022caf576974df54510b8f9ad25f2f4447a72.png)

So, my mod adds paintings of **Oberorka's Element Cattos game**. The paintings are 1:1 cutouts of the cattos' sprites in game on paintings and in reality this adds nothing to the game by just being 2x2 (for the main 121) and 1x1 (for isotopes) paintings. In game you can put the following paintings: 

*Muonium, Hydrogen, Helium, Lithium, Beryllium, Boron, Carbon, Nitrogen, Oxygen, Fluorine, Neon, Sodium, Aluminum, Silicon, Phosphorus, Sulfur, Chlorine, Argon, Potassium, Calcium, Chromium, Iron, Cobalt, Nickel, Copper, Zinc, ***ARSENIC***, Bromine, Rubidium, Srontium, Yttrium, Silver, Tin, Antimony, Xenon, Caesium, , Terbium, Lutetium, Platinum, Gold, Lead (Well! Damn), Astatine, Francium, Uranium and Roentgenium*



List of isotopes:

*Deuterium (²H), Hydrogen-5 (⁵H), Hydrogen-7 (⁷H), Radiocarbon (¹⁴C), Oxygen-12 (¹²O), Helium-2 (²H)*

**Additional informations:**

If someone wants to roleplay as one of the cattos, please use one of the approved skins on namemc (if you don't have a Minecraft premium account, don't worry! There are mods like "Skin Restorer" that can work for you guys too!)

If you want me to make a catto, you have to find me on discord, but remember! The catto still has to get the *Element Cattos* tag if It's one of the main cattos (Elements, Isotopes, Compounds, and Other), only when it is a Fan-Design, then I'll add it in the next update without the tag!


**When and how will I update my mod:**

You can go vote for the rest of my Element Cattos skins on namemc! If one of them is approved I will update the mod! (I will reupload the skins every roughly around 7 days.) (And they are pretty much 1:1 recreations from the game) The mod will not have a update schedule because I don't get cattos approved regularlly, so that's why some updates are like bajilion in 1 day and then silence for like a week or more.



**What will be the future of this mod:**

I will add the main 121 cattos (from Muonium to Unbinilium), and after that... I don't really have more ideas other than start making isotopes (they will be on 1x1 paintings to not have to roll the painting you want, in 2x2 will be the 121 new paintings).

**Milestones:**

50 Catto Special:
